creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Andree from comment #3)

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2022-August/002385.html was the problem that I solve with ipv6 on ethernet card and wireless.

I don't have a deep knowledge with go but in my opinion, using GO_MODULE to fetch modules is not a good thing. Modules should be included in src tarball and some ports have it others I don't really know.
